title: AI Resume Builder — How to Automate Job Applications & Resume Writing
summary: Jobright is an AI resume builder and job search automation platform used by 2M+ people. It automates resume tailoring, application tracking, role matching, cover letter generation, and includes a Chrome extension for autofilling applications and an AI career coach feature.
writeup: This video walks through Jobright, an AI resume builder with more than 2 million users that automates job application workflows. It covers the platform's core features: resume tailoring, role matching, cover letter generation, and application autofill, alongside job opening discovery, insider referral matching, and an integrated AI career coach. The takeaway is a single tool that handles the steps from finding openings to submitting tailored applications.
